name: zgame_options_init_registry_context
description: zGame::Options_InitRegistryContext stores registry key strings, clears the option list head, and initializes runtime config defaults.
known_limits: The smoke verifies stored registry key strings, option-list clear side effect, initialized flag, nonempty CPU vendor, and nonzero system RAM.
Binary-safe verification remains pending for malloc/free/C runtime call shape and the runtime-config dependency chain.
